lastReleaseMessage: Scope tab split into Early Access and Full Release tiers. The Early Access launch scope now carries the full six-unit roster and the complete enemy roster including the Leviathan boss, with their spawner structures and combat VFX. The advanced buildings, stone-tier defences, supporting terrain, and 10-mission intro campaign move to a new Full Release (1.0) tier. The unit and enemy table prose now reads the launch scope as the full roster.

items: Discord webhook URL drop-in once the dev-log channel exists. One line into scripts/.discord_webhook.txt (gitignored).
Item
Item
Cursor art: draw the 8 reticle PNGs (cursor_move/attack_move/force_attack/attack/select/patrol/garrison/ungarrison) per the README color spec.
Quarry AOE anchor is off-center by one tile (tile_position + (1,1) on a 1x1 footprint). Pre-existing; tuning call.
Auto-worker assignment with per-building 1-5 priority slider.
MVP audio: rifle reports, Drowned vocalizations, oil-flame ambient, UI clicks, main theme + ambient music.

Spine2D Phase 2: convert remaining units + buildings to Spine scenes; collapse per-type scales (units 0.3125, enemies 0.25/0.5, building footprint-derived) into ASSET_SCALE_MASTER; re-export art at final size; drop all in-engine downscale to 1.0.
Spine2D Phase 3: bake enemy Spine anims to a frame atlas feeding the MultiMesh shader + perf spike for the live-skeleton ceiling.
Item
On-map hatchery clearing (3-12 per map, 6-12 late).
Strike-team selection UI.
Bilgemaw enemy + Coral Receding visual effect on enemy-structure destruction.
Leviathan boss: single 1200 HP pool, 5x damage vs buildings/walls, passive Shambler spawn every 8s.
Marksman + Trench Sweeper units.
V1 buildings: Manor, Coral Harvest, Research Lab, Harpoon Battery, Repeater Battery, Mortar Battery, Market.
Stone Wall + Stone Tower + Stone Gate (V1 defensive tier).
Research Lab: the 23-node tiered tree (Settlement / Industry / Empire, Lab Tier 1->2->3 gating) playable end-to-end.
Ammo production loop (Powder Mill) - both Ammo per-shot consumption AND Powder Mill cut in v0.13.0.
Honor Roll viewer.
V1 HUD additions: Settings panel, cursor set, selection rings, panel frames.
V1 audio: convoy bells, sortie horn, tension music, Leviathan track.
Item
Mission 1: Hold the Wall (MVP mission expanded).
Mission 2: First Sortie.
Mission 3: The Brood.
Mission 4: The Beached.
Mission 5: The Leviathan.
3 difficulty tiers: Bastion, Last Stand, Damned.
Mission briefing screens + Honor Roll inter-mission view.
Inter-mission save (campaign state persists).
V1 splash + backgrounds: loading, briefing, victory, defeat, credits.
Item
External playtest cohort engaged.
Performance: 60 FPS at peak wave on mid-tier hardware.
Accessibility pass (colorblind palette, font scale, key rebind).
Localization plumbing (one extra language verified).
Balance iteration from playtest data.
Bug bash.
Steam page live, launch trailer cut.
Release build certified Windows (macOS/Linux out of scope, owner decision 2026-06-23).
Day-1 patch plan in place.
Discord + Steam community channels live.
Item
V2 enemies: Stranded, Brinecaster, Skimmer, Caller, boss-class finales.
V2 units: Tommy, Harpoonist (both scaffolded; full behavior is V2).
V2 walls + towers (currently empty - all V2 wall variants were cut in v0.13.0 except for the Wood/Stone parity-pair).
V2 wonders: Aquifer Wellhead, The Cloister.
Repeater Battery + Mortar Battery were promoted into the V1 scope lock (v0.38.0). See M2 V1 buildings.
Additional biomes: Brackish Belt sortie tiles, Wasteland.
Skirmish mode.
Item
Project location: share HBH repo under depths/ or fork to own repo.
Faction name lock: "Fathom Watch" vs six alternatives.
Pyre as v2 Wonder building (incinerator that buffs cleanse range).
Harpoon Battery v1 ship vs demote to v2.
Save mid-mission for v1 vs between-mission only.
Game title: confirm "Brackish Rising" through late-M3 review.
Item
Solo-dev voice sweep on README, CHANGELOG, BACKLOG, in-code comments touched. No em dashes, no AI tells.

barRaise.topFinding: This is the trivially-healthy cycle. v0.59.5 closed both watch items from last week: the durable release gate is built (check_release_descriptive.py now carries check_footer_contiguous plus the footer-pill and descriptive-CHANGELOG guards) and the YaE work-queue drain was made truncation-safe by rotating its drain log to a capped sidecar. The same commit retired three documentation-hygiene LOWs: the GDD footer hole v0.58.14-v0.58.42 backfilled, the bare-auto-message CHANGELOG band rewritten descriptive, and ASSETS.md content regenerated. Zero HIGH and zero MEDIUM findings; the 06-25 canonical audit verified every fix against disk. The honest caveat holds: v0.59.5 shipped no gameplay code, so several consecutive cycles have been doc/infra/reconciliation, and the remaining M1 surface is largely Navy's art. The seven open actions are all LOW. The next session should put code on an M2 row or capture the peak-wave profile, not more bookkeeping.
barRaise.actionsClearedNote: Open actions verified 2026-06-25: resolved in code or deferred-to-backlog by design. Budget's .finances orphan-SHA exposure is carried separately (user-gated repo recreate / GH support; runbook docs/FINANCES_REMOTE_GC.md).
